74845.subject: Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Suspended by Anthropic Following U.S. Order
74845.body:
AI NOW & BEYOND

Автор: AI NOW & BEYOND


Автор: AI NOW & BEYOND

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/fable-5-mythos-suspended-anthropic-following-us-order-gptai-8gmmc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B8FkcW5zUTV2qcOjGcqdGWg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2-RCG7kPEcbsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqmd8jb2~d7-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqmd8jb2-d7
  
Today in AI NOW & BEYOND 🔥 The Most Important AI Skill Everybody Is Talking About Anthropic Suspends Fable 5 and Mythos 5 After U.S. Export Control Order Trending AI Tools AI Resources The Most Important AI Skill Everybody Is Talking About AI can write, reason, automate, and assist, but measuring its effectiveness is becoming one of the biggest challenges for organizations. In this hands-on bootcamp, you'll learn how to evaluate AI systems, uncover hidden issues, and improve performance using practical frameworks that work in the real world. Whether you're an engineer, manager, founder, or AI enthusiast, you'll gain skills that are increasingly essential as AI adoption accelerates. Discounted pricing is now live! Get 30% off for a limited time with code SMART30. Claim Your 30% Discount Now - Code: SMART30! Anthropic Suspends Fable 5 and Mythos 5 After U.S. Export Control Order Company disables access globally after national security directive raises concerns over potential jailbreak risk Anthropic temporarily suspended Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after a US export control order raised national security concerns. The directive requires blocking foreign nationals, so Anthropic disabled both models for all customers while it works on compliance. Key Points: Models pulled globally: Anthropic disabled access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all customers after receiving the directive. National security concern: The government letter reportedly did not provide details, but Anthropic believes the concern may involve a possible method to jailbreak Fable 5. Foreign national restriction: The order blocks access by any foreign national, whether inside or outside the U.S., including Anthropic’s own foreign national employees. Older models unaffected: Existing Anthropic models like Opus and Sonnet remain available and are not covered by the directive. Anthropic pushes back: The company argues that a narrow potential jailbreak should not justify recalling a commercial model used by hundreds of millions of people. Safeguards already tested: Anthropic says Fable 5 underwent extensive red-teaming with U.S. and U.K. government partners, private organizations, and internal teams, and that no universal jailbreak has been found. Why It Matters: This is a major escalation in government control over frontier AI. If export officials can force labs to pull mo

74843.subject: 🐶📰 Weekend Update
74843.body:
**BTC** $63,608 (1.8%) | **ETH** $1,726 (2.0%) | **SOL** $72 (4.8%)

———————————————————————————

Welcome to the Daily Bone Weekend Update where we recap the top stories from the  week. Be sure to check out our daily newsletter to get all of your news hot off the press each and every weekday!

———————————————————————————

### Headlines

* US Hormuz blockade ended after [deal with Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595) was signed

* Fed held rates steady and omitted forward guidance at Warsh's [first meeting](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067307283919581688) — Odds of a July [rate hike](https://polymarket.com/event/fed-decision-in-july-181) increased to 25%

* STRC fell[ as low as $82](https://x.com/Croesus_BTC/status/2067643944016486751?s=20) before recovering back over $88 — ==Saylor admitted to using AI to develop ==[STRC](https://x.com/CoinDesk/status/2067670392911667278)

* Binance’s MiCA [license is in jeopardy](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066884038791762199?s=20) and the exchange could lose permission to serve EU clients

———————————————————————————

### TradFi

* ==Rockstar opens pre-orders for ==[GTA 6](https://x.com/RockstarGames/status/2067594067030979053)== on June 25==

* ==Intel gained ==[14%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/INTC)== on rumors of Apple chip deal==

* ==CME group announced plans to ====[sue the CFTC](https://x.com/fintechfrank/status/2067422497998315931?s=20)==== over regulation of perpetual futures==

* SpaceX briefly [flipped Microsoft](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2066884086174458063?s=20) to become 4th largest public company by market cap before pulling back — SpaceX to [acquire Cursor](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2066844381504561211?s=20) coding platform for $60B

———————————————————————————

### Crypto

* Franklin Templeton filedfor ETF that reinvests [stock dividends into BTC](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2067909471435685965?s=20)

* SBF told prison inmate that he will [launch a token](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067063631012139258?s=20) when he gets out of jail

* HYPE ETFs have now recorded [$153M in net inflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2066656817913250232?s=20) — HYPE hit a [new ATH of $77](https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/trade/HYPE) on Wednesday

* Strategy [added $100M BTC](https://x.com/saylor/status/2066491610863419722?s=20) and $100M cash reserves

———————————————————————————

### AI

* AI image and video generation company Midjourney revealed [full body medical scanner](https://x.com/midjourney/status/2067421950314688759?s=20)

* ==Coinbase launched SEC-registered ====[AI investment advisors](https://x.com/coinbase/status/2066969129110630667)==

* ==White House demanded that Fable 5 be ====[impossible to jailbreak](https://x.com/Polymarket/status/2067357928206594261?s=20)==== before re-release — Anthropic CEO said companies testing Mythos liken it to a ====[super weapon](https://x.com/Polyma

 The Economist

The Economist This Weekend

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTN9AAcAAAAAAvJE8NG1QL-JTNjanK2QdGFUMt_kzmvmoiHVmVCsMF63RIFp0DvVl6UxK9WEnCb-shqU-IT4Jm5Lf2YwG_FiNMCuR2YFRuMUqtIP 

Video: Timo Lenzen



Rachel Lloyd

Deputy culture editor



A few weeks ago I had an unexpected experience at the cinema. I went into “The Sheep Detectives” expecting it to be a lighthearted, silly yarn: Hugh Jackman, after all, was playing shepherd to a flock of computer-generated sheep. Yet Craig Mazin’s script was anything but woolly. The film was funny and surprisingly profound as it explored belonging, grief and the bond between animals and humans. It made me think of “Bambi”, “Up”, “Coco” and other children’s films that grapple with the heavy theme of loss. 


Little wonder, then, that &ldqu

>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme

>>>>>>>> a veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>> stretnutia sa radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️
